content_body: The creek and seating area near the fire pit was our favorite part. Such a beautiful property, area, and cabin! The decor, style, and amenities of the cabin were the best we have ever stayed anywhere. The screened in front porch was inviting and delightful. Our dog had a wonderful stay as well. Because the cabin was pet-friendly, that was a major factor in staying there. Thank You for the lovely hand-made card and note to us upon arrival. God bless your family and CROG!
title: Best We Have Experienced!
